case_title: MUNIR HANIFA B et al VS OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUNIR HANIFA B JAMEEL HAJI M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMILTON MR DBA OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY $390.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $418.00, OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON MR DBA OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY HEARING SET FOR APR-20-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,440.00 FILED BY MUNIR HANIFA B JAMEEL HAJI M AS TO DEFENDANT OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY HAMILTON MR DBA OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY ROBINSON L MR DBA OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON MR DBA OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANTS RETURNED, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-20-1992, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON MR DBA OCEANVIEW UPHOLSTERY
